title: DCMS Sector Economic Estimates: Research and Development (R&D)
body: "Headline finding     In  2023, expenditure on R&D by businesses in the included DCMS sectors accounted for around 17% of R&D expenditure by UK businesses overall.     About  DCMS R&D estimates provide an estimate of expenditure on R&D by UK businesses in DCMS sectors. These R&D estimates are designed to complement our other economic estimates and to give a deeper understanding of the economic performance of DCMS sectors to the UK economy.   All estimates on this page represent the latest version.  Included estimates:   R&D expenditure by businesses in the DCMS sectors   For information on how these estimates are produced please see the relevant technical report for each release.  Latest release:  DCMS Sector Economic Estimates: Research and Development (R&D), 2023  "
